reviews.review_title: Fun but i have some ideas
reviews.review_description: Though the game is fun i feel like it needs some more like having the growth potion and shrink potions actually change your size and maybe a full body rag doll. The game also has a few bugs with multiplayer and gravity gun, but is still extremely fun

My friend made me download this game and I hate it. Cheap g tag rip off, when someone touches you fall and can't get up, space is too bright, have to spam enter to get in, buttons are impossible to Tap, and don't touch the dog in the shop. Never download.
The owner stole my girlfriend and took my cat.. he has me hostage please get the game
Fire game I should know I work on it
Good game play it or you die.

reviews.review_description: I cant use spawn gun for some reason

reviews.review_title: Conner is crying L so sad to bad

reviews.review_description:
Very nice game! its a bit janky but it has so much charm to it honestly, its buggy and glitchy but its fun to play with a few good friends. the playermodels are silly and the entire game just overall has a nice vibe to it. 

the only bug that makes it a bit annoying to play is the spawn gun crashes people sometimes, but besides that, amazing game!

id love to see this game get worked on a bit more, i hope it  doesn’t get abandoned, cause the shopkeeper is but a goofy guy. :^)
Games really buggy so it’s not that good sorry

reviews.review_title: Game is funny but now good
reviews.review_description: when you go to the lobby your hand gets stuck in the floor and it gets hard to rip it off and sometimes you have to leave and rejoin. When people punch you roll and Ragdoll. I think the Ragdoll feature should still be in the game but like an option to turn it off and on, but when something happens in the game like the Heli crashes you still Ragdoll. Please add a option to mute people and make the spawn menu much more easier and make it that when you try to spawn something it stays in place and doesn’t go anywhere. Also, make the vehicle more easy to drive.
I’m still on 514 and it sucks can you help

developer_response.body: Have you tried seeing if your on the right version channel cuz there is no reason that should be happening and you could also try reinstalling
